description: Have a blast on the field or on your everyday jogs with these comfortable shoes from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure. This pair is worth adding in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Synthetic upper with overlays and suede covered toe and heel cup for structural comfort Padded tongue and collar with a central lace-up system for snug Fit and comfort Perforations and mesh for enhanced breathability Cushioned sockliner for in-step cushioning Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Brand name on tongue for style Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with suction points on the forefoot and heel for added grip Pivot point on the forefoot for 180 degrees flexibility Suction grooves for maximum grip and traction shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
